test.command: set -a && . "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/secrets.env" && set +a && cargo test --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" && cargo test --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" --features local

typecheck.command: set -a && . "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/secrets.env" && set +a && cargo build --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" --release && cargo build --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" --release --features local

lint.command: set -a && . "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/secrets.env" && set +a && cargo clippy --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" --features local -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --manifest-path "/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/Cargo.toml" --all --check

blockingIssues.description: `crates/vera-core/src/local_models.rs:31` leaves `.part` files behind when model download streaming or rename fails, so partial-download cleanup required by the feature and VAL-LOCAL-005 is missing.
`crates/vera-core/src/retrieval/local_reranker.rs:156` returns reranker scores in input order instead of descending relevance order, violating the `Reranker` contract and VAL-LOCAL-004.

`crates/vera-core/src/retrieval/search_service.rs:32` swallows the explicit non-local-build error from dynamic provider creation and silently falls back to BM25, so `vera search --local` / MCP `VERA_LOCAL=1` do not surface the required graceful error.

`crates/vera-core/src/retrieval/search_service.rs:63` and `crates/vera-core/src/indexing/update.rs:105-119,188,208` do not explicitly validate stored `embedding_dim` against the active provider, so mismatches can degrade instead of producing the required re-index error.

nonBlockingIssues.description: `crates/vera-core/src/retrieval/search_service.rs:44` ships the metadata-dimension fix without an automated regression test, leaving the local-search path covered only by manual verification.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the `VERA_LOCAL=1` environment toggle and first-run local-model download behavior in `.factory/library/environment.md`.
Added local-mode user-testing notes covering `cargo build --release --features local`, MCP validation via `VERA_LOCAL=1`, and model-download expectations in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.
Corrected the local-model storage note and recorded the `ort::Session` mutex constraint in `.factory/library/architecture.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align `implementation-worker` and its handoff expectations with validation-heavy features: require explicit deviation notes when workers skip the skill's red-test/manual-CLI steps, or provide a lighter-weight path for integration/scrutiny-driven tasks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `local-onnx-foundation`, `local-cli-integration`, and `cross-area-integration` all found `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true` even though transcript skeletons showed no red-test-first step and, for the CLI/MCP feature, no recorded manual CLI/MCP verification required by the skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or qualify the claim that local model storage is configurable via `VERA_MODEL_DIR` until the code implements that override, or prioritize implementing the override to match the documented convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: `AGENTS.md` says local models are stored in `~/.vera/models/` and configurable via `VERA_MODEL_DIR`, but the `local-onnx-foundation` review found `crates/vera-core/src/local_models.rs` hardcodes only `~/.vera/models/`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether validators may create isolated temp repos outside the project root, and keep AGENTS/library guidance consistent on approved scratch locations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `cross-area-integration` review found `AGENTS.md` forbids modifying files outside the Vera repo root while `.factory/library/user-testing.md` directs validators to use isolated repos under `/tmp`, leading the worker to create `/home/lamim/test_repo_langs` outside the repo.
